products.title: Dino Fury
products.body_html:
Frag Size 1"- 2"

Please note, this is a cut to order frag. If we do not have one prepped please allow up to 2 weeks for healing.

When acclimating your new coral I recommend placing it lower in the tank to prevent shock due to high lighting. If your coral turns brown It could be due to a lack of light or excess PO4. If your coral turns white (pale) it could be excess light or lack of NO3&PO4. I recommend giving a coral few weeks to adjust to it's new location before moving it to a new location.

All corals will be shipped overnight via UPS Next Day Air.

products.title: Professional Aquarium Management Services
products.body_html:
Is maintaining your aquarium becoming overwhelming? Or do you want to have a piece of the ocean in your home? As expert providers of aquarium maintenance proudly serving South West Chicago Suburbs: Will County, DuPage County, Kendall County & Grundy County.

 

  • $108/ 1Hour Exclusive Weekly Maintenance Package
  • $114/ 1Hour Expected Biweekly Maintenance Package
  • $114/ 1Hour Essential Monthly Maintenance Package
  • $120/ 1Hour Efficient One Time Maintenance Service

 

    Types of customers we serve

Residential Maintenance

Commercial Maintenance

High-Profile Aquarium Services

 

    Our professional Aquatic Technicians will arrive with all the tools and equipment needed to provide quick, neat and thorough service to your aquatic display. We follow a rigorous schedule, which includes:

 

  • Test water chemistry: pH, alkalinity, salinity, PO4, NO3 and trace elements
  • Comprehensive evaluation of fish and coral/plant health
  • Systematic evaluation of filter and service
  • Partial water exchanges to keep aquatic life at its peak health
  • Detailed cleaning of rock and display elements
  • Inspect all equipment
  • Clean aquarium glass inside and out
  • Get a Free Coral Frag on each visit and additional 20% OFF from all “Cut To Order” frags from our website “RUTR20G”

 

Filtered RO/DI water is extra $0.5 per gallon and Filtered RO/DI Saltwater is $1 per gallon. (For our Subscription Customers is free up to 10 gallons)

 

Disclaimer

We strive to provide our customers with all necessary information and to perform maintenance during our visits. However, since we are not available 24/7, we cannot be held responsible for the health or well-being of your animals or for any damage to your property.

By purchasing aquarium maintenance services from Reef Under The Roof Inc., you acknowledge and agree that the company is not liable for any property damage caused by water or fire or any other damage on that matter. You also understand that it is your responsibility to maintain adequate insurance coverage for your property to protect against such risks.

For Our Subscription Clients Only - Please respond to all of our messages. If we attempt to schedule an appointment three times without receiving a reply, you will be charged for one visit, even if the maintenance was not completed.

products.title: Chicago Sunburst BTA
products.body_html:
Size: 3"- 5"

Our Chicago Anemones (CHSB) are NEVER mixed with other Nems or other LPS/Soft corals. Chicago BTAs are beautiful anemones but very sensitive when mixed. We guarantee that they are 100% healthy and won't require a Ciprofloxacin treatment like most other Chicago need when bought from other vendors.

Check us out on Instagram/Facebook/YouTube/TikTok ,,Reef Under The Roof"!

All corals/anemones will be shipped overnight via UPS Next Day Air

products.body_html:
Frag Size 1"- 2"

Please note, this is a cut to order frag. If we do not have one prepped please allow up to 2 weeks for healing.

When acclimating your new coral I recommend placing it lower in the tank to prevent shock due to high lighting. If your coral turns brown It could be due to a lack of light or excess PO4. If your coral turns white (pale) it could be excess light or lack of NO3&PO4. I recommend giving a coral few weeks to adjust to it's new location before moving it to a new location.

All corals will be shipped overnight via UPS Next Day Air.

products.title: Colorado Sunburst BTA
products.body_html:
Size: 3”–5”

Our Colorado Sunburst Anemones (CSB) are never housed or mixed with other anemones or LPS/soft corals. While Colorado BTAs are exceptionally beautiful, they are also highly sensitive when kept with other species.

We guarantee that our specimens are 100% healthy and will not require Ciprofloxacin treatment, which is often necessary for Colorado anemones sourced from other vendors.

If the item is currently out of stock, please feel free to reach out—we would be happy to add you to our waitlist.

Check us out on Instagram/Facebook/YouTube/TikTok ,,Reef Under The Roof" where we have a lot of videos posted of our Sunburst/Mangrove Tank with our Colorado BTAs.

All corals/anemones will be shipped overnight via UPS Next Day Air.

products.title: Coaching Session - 1 hour Consultation
products.body_html:
Need Expert Reefing Advice? Book a Consultation with Us!

Topics We Can Help With:

  • Coral health concerns and growth challenges
  • Water parameter balance and problem-solving
  • Pests, algae outbreaks, and urgent tank issues
  • Equipment setup, lighting choices, and flow tuning
  • Reefkeeping guidance from beginner to advanced levels
  • Caring for and acclimating auction corals

What’s Included:

✔️ 1 hour one-on-one Zoom, Skype or phone session

✔️ Personal guidance backed by 10+ years of reefing experience

✔️ Practical, easy-to-follow steps you can use right away

✔️ Straightforward, results-driven advice—no hype, no fluff

✔️ 20% Coupon for All Cut to Order Frags

You will be emailed within 24 hours of placing your order to setup a day and time.

products.title: Phosphate - Aquarium Supplement
products.body_html:
Starting dosage: 0.5ml/25gal/day

Keep Phosphates: 0.03 - 0.1ppm

Made with KH2PO4

Test often and dose as needed

Shipping to US only

products.title: Nitrate - Aquarium Supplement
products.body_html:
Starting dosage: 1ml/25gal/day

Keep Nitrates: 3 - 10ppm

Made with KNO3 & NaNO3

Test Nitrate & Potassium if using this product

Test often and dose as needed

Shipping to US only
